title: Bonus Points

open_issues.text: Consider whether a credible maritime angle could be argued (LFP for port equipment electrification, short-sea shipping batteries). Currently assessed as a stretch that risks credibility. Recommend leaving as not applicable unless project team identifies a concrete maritime offtake agreement.

B1_net_carbon_removals.rationale: LFP manufacturing does not remove carbon from atmosphere

B2_sme.rationale: FIB and Eni are both large enterprises

B3_maritime.rationale: Project targets general battery market, not specifically maritime decarbonisation

strategic_note: Zero bonus points expected. This is consistent with the proposal outline strategy: effort is better invested in maximising scores on weighted criteria (Innovation x2, Maturity x2, EU Leadership 10pts) rather than pursuing marginal bonus arguments.
